name: ci

# see https://docs.github.com/en/actions/using-workflows/workflow-syntax-for-github-actions#permissions
on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
